headline: Is It Time To Reassess Arista Networks (ANET) After Its 55% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Arista Networks is fairly priced or still offering value after its strong run in recent years, a good starting point is to understand what the current share price is really reflecting. The stock trades at US$120.77, with a 1 year return of 55.0% but a recent pullback of 8.0% over 7 days and 9.5% over 30 days. The question is whether this shift is hinting at changing growth expectations or simply normal volatility. Recent coverage has focused on Arista Networks as...
